requirement_topic.en: MMA Refrigerant and ODS Controls — HCFC Phasedown, R-22 Restrictions, Montreal Protocol
requirement_topic.zh: MMA制冷剂和消耗臭氧层物质管制——HCFC逐步淘汰、R-22限制、《蒙特利尔议定书》
requirement_topic.zht: MMA製冷劑和消耗臭氧層物質管制——HCFC逐步淘汰、R-22限制、《蒙特利爾議定書》

summary.en: Chile's Ministerio del Medio Ambiente (MMA) administers ODS (ozone-depleting substances) controls under Chile's Montreal Protocol commitments and the Ley 19.300 (Ley sobre Bases Generales del Medio Ambiente). R-22 (HCFC-22) is subject to a phasedown schedule; import of new equipment pre-charged with R-22 is increasingly restricted and subject to ODS permits from MMA. Equipment using R-32 or R-410A is preferred and does not carry ODS permit obligations. Importers of heat pumps and air conditioners charged with regulated refrigerants must verify current MMA import permit requirements, Chilean Customs ODS control documentation, and any HCFC-specific restrictions applicable at time of shipment.
summary.zh: 智利环境部（MMA）根据智利《蒙特利尔议定书》承诺及第19.300号法律（一般环境基本法）管制消耗臭氧层物质（ODS）。R-22（HCFC-22）受逐步淘汰时间表约束；预充R-22的新设备进口受到日益严格的限制，须取得MMA颁发的ODS许可。使用R-32或R-410A的设备受到青睐，无需承担ODS许可义务。进口充注受管制制冷剂的热泵和空调器的进口商须核验当前MMA进口许可要求、智利海关ODS管控文件，以及出货时适用的任何HCFC特定限制。
summary.zht: 智利環境部（MMA）根據智利《蒙特利爾議定書》承諾及第19.300號法律（一般環境基本法）管制消耗臭氧層物質（ODS）。R-22（HCFC-22）受逐步淘汰時間表約束；預充R-22的新設備進口受到日益嚴格的限制，須取得MMA頒發的ODS許可。使用R-32或R-410A的設備受到青睞，無需承擔ODS許可義務。進口充注受管制製冷劑的熱泵和空調器的進口商須核驗當前MMA進口許可要求、智利海關ODS管控文件，以及出貨時適用的任何HCFC特定限制。

standards_or_laws: Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer (Chile signatory)
Ley 19.300 — Ley sobre Bases Generales del Medio Ambiente (Chile)
MMA Decreto Supremo on ODS controls and HCFC phasedown schedule
Servicio Nacional de Aduanas (Chilean Customs) ODS import controls

summary.en: China administers ODS controls under GB 9237 (refrigerant safety baseline) and its domestic HCFC phasedown schedule aligned with the Montreal Protocol, administered by MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment). China is also phasing down R-22 in new production, and new Chinese heat pump equipment predominantly uses R-32 or R-410A. Chinese ODS compliance documentation (MEE permits, refrigerant safety data sheets under GB 9237) is not a substitute for Chilean MMA ODS import permits where required.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 9237（制冷剂安全基准）及与《蒙特利尔议定书》对齐的国内HCFC逐步淘汰时间表管制ODS，由生态环境部主管。中国也在新生产中逐步淘汰R-22，新中国热泵设备主要使用R-32或R-410A。中国ODS合规文件（生态环境部许可、GB 9237制冷剂安全数据表）不能替代智利MMA在需要时签发的ODS进口许可。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 9237（製冷劑安全基準）及與《蒙特利爾議定書》對齊的國內HCFC逐步淘汰時間表管制ODS，由生態環境部主管。中國也在新生產中逐步淘汰R-22，新中國熱泵設備主要使用R-32或R-410A。中國ODS合規文件（生態環境部許可、GB 9237製冷劑安全數據表）不能替代智利MMA在需要時簽發的ODS進口許可。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 — Refrigerating systems and heat pumps — Safety and environmental requirements
MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) HCFC phasedown schedule

gap.en: Equipment pre-charged with R-22 faces significant import restrictions in Chile; MMA ODS permits may be required and are not satisfied by Chinese MEE documentation. Equipment using R-32 or R-410A faces no ODS permit gap and is the recommended path for new exports to Chile. Exporters should confirm the current HCFC import status with MMA or Chilean Customs before shipping any R-22 pre-charged units, as the phasedown schedule has progressively narrowed the permitted import window.
gap.zh: 预充R-22的设备在智利面临严格进口限制；可能需要取得MMA ODS许可，中国生态环境部文件无法满足该要求。使用R-32或R-410A的设备不存在ODS许可差距，是出口智利的推荐路径。出口商在出运任何预充R-22设备前，应向MMA或智利海关确认当前HCFC进口状态，因为逐步淘汰时间表已逐步收窄允许进口的时间窗口。
gap.zht: 預充R-22的設備在智利面臨嚴格進口限制；可能需要取得MMA ODS許可，中國生態環境部文件無法滿足該要求。使用R-32或R-410A的設備不存在ODS許可差距，是出口智利的推薦路徑。出口商在出運任何預充R-22設備前，應向MMA或智利海關確認當前HCFC進口狀態，因為逐步淘汰時間表已逐步收窄允許進口的時間窗口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ODS/HCFC import controls enforced by MMA and Chilean Customs; R-22 pre-charged equipment subject to phasedown restrictions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under MEE HCFC phasedown schedule for Chinese domestic market; Chinese ODS documents not accepted by MMA Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Moderate-to-major gap for R-22 pre-charged equipment — MMA ODS permit may be required and phasedown restrictions apply; no gap for R-32 or R-410A equipment. Chinese MEE ODS documents are not accepted by MMA Chile.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 预充R-22设备存在中到重大差距——可能需要MMA ODS许可且逐步淘汰限制适用；R-32或R-410A设备无差距。中国生态环境部ODS文件不被MMA智利接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 預充R-22設備存在中到重大差距——可能需要MMA ODS許可且逐步淘汰限制適用；R-32或R-410A設備無差距。中國生態環境部ODS文件不被MMA智利接受。
